title: Supervision of forestry program; detailed plan
doc_html:
§4326.  Supervision of forestry program; detailed plan

The state forester with the approval of the forestry commission may administer and supervise the forestry program in each parish where such programs may be established.

Acts 2012, No. 808, §1.
doc_text:
§4326.  Supervision of forestry program; detailed plan
The state forester with the approval of the forestry commission may administer and supervise the forestry program in each parish where such programs may be established.
Acts 2012, No. 808, §1.
